title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: ### Hard Claude coupling points (current behavior) - [kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L98-L116) hard-builds a default matrix `codex + claude + glm` and validates that all three provider keys exist. This forces Claude into any run that relies on defaults. - [kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L296-L302) enforces vote viability as `>=1 Codex + >=2 non-Codex`, so a Claude-free profile still needs two non-Codex lanes available to pass. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L9-L13) sets `assist_provider="claude"` by default and only appends Claude assist lanes when `assist_provider=="claude"` (lines around [348-350] and [355-359]), which makes Claude the default sub-orchestrator mode. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L13-L14,47-48) defaults assist to `claude` in env + CLI docs, then feeds that into matrix construction (`--assist-provider "${ASSIST_PROVIDER}"` around [602-605]). - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L542-L553,823-L849,918-L938) defaults `FUGUE_LOCAL_REQUIRE_CLAUDE_ASSIST_ON_COMPLEX=true` and `FUGUE_LOCAL_REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO=true`, and gate logic fails execution when expected Claude-assist/baseline conditions are not met. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-policy.sh#L24-L33,129-133,191-207) defaults `default_assist="claude"` and injects fallback/invariant behavior that can reintroduce Claude when assist is unspecified. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24#L280-L281,L526-L531) passes `--default-assist "claude"` to policy and falls back to `"claude"` for local assist when no explicit assist/provider value is present. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L45-L53,L123-L130,L134-L149,L201-L227,L256-L261) has defaults `REQUIRE_DIRECT_CLAUDE_ASSIST=true` and `REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO=true`, and baseline/assist gate failure reasons explicitly require Claude lane behavior. - [fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L78-L80,651-661) and [scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L172-L173,188-193) propagate `DEFAULT_ASSIST_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER` defaulting to Claude into policy resolution. - Issue path defaults also bias Claude: [scripts/local/create-fugue-issue.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/create-fugue-issue.sh#L11-L13), [scripts/local/dispatch-mainframe.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/dispatch-mainframe.sh#L9-L16), and [scripts/local/create-kernel-googleworkspace-issues.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/create-kernel-googleworkspace-issues.sh#L8-L24) seed labels/default assist as Claude. ### Concrete changes for a coherent Claude-free Codex-led path - [kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh) change default matrix construction to be provider-profile-driven (e.g., `KERNEL_ORCHESTRATION_DEFAULT_PROVIDERS="codex,glm"`) and relax the jq...
